topStories.description: The government had reached out to at least two parties — the Congress and the Samajwadi Party — seeking their opinion on advancing the timeline for implementing the legislation

topStories.title: Congress seeks all-party meet on Women’s Reservation Act
topStories.description: Government reaches out again, this time in writing, after Congress spurns its informal feelers to discuss the implementation timeline for the Women’s Reservation Act

topStories.title: Congress accuses Modi govt. of doing U-turn on implementation of women’s reservation law
topStories.description: Move marks reversal of the government’s earlier stand that the provisions of the Nari Shakti Vandan Adhiniyam could only be operationalised after the completion of the next Census and delimitation exercise, it says

topStories.title: BJP dismisses fuel scarcity claims, slams Congress for spreading panic

dailyNews.description: The US is imposing a military blockade of the Strait of Hormuz after Iran blocked shipping.

dailyNews.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 48 of the US-Iran conflict?
dailyNews.description: US–Iran talks gain pace as Pakistan mediates, optimism for a new round of talks in Islamabad.

dailyNews.title: Iran-Linked Ships Take New Path To Trickle Into the Persian Gulf
dailyNews.description: At least two US-sanctioned, Iran-linked vessels made their way through the Strait of Hormuz and into the Persian Gulf on Thursday, taking what may be a new route from the United Arab Emirates even as a US blockade enters its third day.

dailyNews.title: The pope has shown the world how to stand up to Trump
dailyNews.description: Far too many world leaders have chosen to mollify the bullying US president. Pope Leo has shown there's another way.

dailyNews.title: Trump says US pushing ‘historic’ Israel-Lebanon talks after 34 years, ‘trying to get a little breathing room’
dailyNews.description: The announcement signals a potential diplomatic breakthrough in a region marked by an increase in hostility and intermittent conflict between Israel and Lebanon.

dailyNews.title: Trump plans 250-foot ‘Triumphal Arch’ to mark 250 years of US independence
dailyNews.description: The Trump administration has unveiled plans for a huge structure to mark 250 years since the US declared independence.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Israel and Lebanon’s leaders will speak on Thursday
dailyNews.description: US president says the leaders of the two countries will speak for the first time in 34 years on Thursday.

dailyNews.title: NY Times reporter loses job over hot tub photos, NFL coach does not: Same old double-standard story
dailyNews.description: Newly-surfaced photos of NFL reporter Dianna Russini and Patriots coach Mike Vrabel raise questions about journalistic ethics and a painful double standard.

dailyNews.title: 2 detained after shooting in New York leaves 15-year-old killed, two others wounded: police
dailyNews.description: A gang-related shooting on Long Island in New York killed a 15-year-old boy and wounded two others after an argument at a barbeque, police said Wednesday.

dailyNews.title: Markwayne Mullin decries CA governor front-runner Tom Steyer, claims he ‘doesn’t understand’ ICE
dailyNews.description: DHS Secretary Mullin accuses California gubernatorial candidate Tom Steyer of not understanding ICE after Steyer called the agency criminal.

dailyNews.title: Pandemonium: Pro Wrestling kickstarts WrestleMania week with hard-hitting action in Las Vegas
dailyNews.description: Indie promotion Pandemonium: Pro Wrestling kicked off WrestleMania week in Las Vegas with an intimate, action-packed event at the Bizarre Bar venue.

dailyNews.title: Iran to execute first female protester tied to anti-regime unrest

topStories.title: Trump’s Portrayal of the War in Iran Collides With Reality
topStories.description: President Trump is confronting a crisis that is not bending to his narrative of a “pretty reasonable” new regime in Iran and all-but-assured victory for the United States.

topStories.title: Trump Breaks With Meloni, Italy’s Leader, Amid Dispute Over Pope and Iran
topStories.description: Prime Minister Giorgia Meloni was once considered one of President Trump’s closest European allies. Their friendship now appears in danger.

topStories.description: When President Trump and G.O.P. leaders denounced the pope’s comments about the U.S. attack on Iran, they touched off a religious debate over what is and isn’t a “just war.”

topStories.description: The story of how President Trump quadrupled the size of the original proposal for the arch follows a now-familiar pattern.

dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.

dailyNews.title: Trump says Iran war "close to over" amid push for new peace talks
dailyNews.description: With the Iran war paused halfway through a 2-week ceasefire, President Trump is again voicing optimism over the potential for a deal to end it for good.

dailyNews.title: 3 killed in latest U.S. strike on alleged drug boat in eastern Pacific, Pentagon says
dailyNews.description: President Trump has said the U.S. is in "armed conflict" with cartels in Latin America and has justified the attacks as a necessary escalation to stem the flow of drugs into the U.S.

dailyNews.title: Gabbard sends criminal referrals to DOJ for 2 officials linked to Trump impeachment
dailyNews.description: Director of National Intelligence Tulsi Gabbard has sent criminal referrals to the Justice Department related to a government watchdog and a whistleblower whose complaint helped trigger President Trump's first impeachment.

dailyNews.title: What we know as Trump says China agreed not to send weapons to Iran
dailyNews.description: President Trump said Wednesday that China has agreed not to send weapons to Iran. Phelim Kine, the China and Indo-Pacific Affairs correspondent at Politico, joins "The Daily Report" with more.
